institution.name: University of Maine at Presque Isle

flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at University of Maine at Presque Isle are 17% below the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($41.0k vs $49.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at University of Maine at Presque Isle rose 15% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.9k → $14.9k).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at University of Maine at Presque Isle fell 12% between 2021 and 2024 (66.7% → 58.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at University of Maine at Presque Isle rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($8.5k → $9.4k).
